blocks.description: Header comments, OPTIONS for macro tracing and page layout, and LIBNAME statements for raw clinical data (read-only), staging workspace, and target output library.

DATA step to define cohort eligibility: applies inclusion criteria (age 18-85, target diagnosis codes, continuous enrollment) and exclusion criteria (prior treatment, missing consent, high comorbidity), assigns treatment/control group and age group for matching.

PROC SQL for 1:1 age-sex greedy matching: joins treatment to control patients on age_group and gender, selects closest age match using HAVING MIN(age_diff), and produces cohort matching summary counts.

DATA step with RETAIN to compute follow-up duration: tracks cumulative days at risk per patient, calculates total follow-up from first encounter, applies 365-day/study-end censoring, and flags primary outcome events (hospitalization, ER, death).
PROC FREQ for outcome analysis: chi-square test and relative risk estimation for outcome event rates by treatment vs control cohort group.
PROC MEANS to generate baseline characteristics table: summarizes age, Charlson index, HbA1c, BMI, and blood pressure by cohort group with mean, std, median, and n statistics.

DATA step to compute hazard indicators: keeps last record per patient, calculates person-years and hazard rate estimate, and assigns risk categories (HIGH for events within 90 days, MODERATE, CENSORED, LOW).
